name: minimesh

optional.MESHY_API_KEY: Meshy AI API key for real 3D generation — omit to use mock provider
optional.BLENDER_PATH: Absolute path to Blender executable — omit to use fallback normalize/thumbnail mode
optional.STORAGE_PATH: Override the storage directory path — use a persistent volume in production

volumes./app/storage: Persistent asset registry, job state, and project data
volumes./app/exports: Generated GLB files, thumbnails, export packages, and normalized meshes

notes: Single-worker uvicorn — file-based storage is not safe for multiple workers.
Mount /app/storage and /app/exports as persistent volumes to survive restarts.
Blender is NOT included in the image. Set BLENDER_PATH to mount a host Blender binary.
If MESHY_API_KEY is absent, all 3D generation uses the built-in mock provider.
